message:
test(ft-conformance): entr scipy subprocess conformance [bd-b5of]

Adds torch_entr_scipy_subprocess_conformance covering 28 inputs:
the x == 0 mask branch (both +0 and -0), tiny / interior / large
positive x including the entropy maximum near 1/e, the IEEE
sign-of-zero case at x == 1 (entr(1) = -0), x < 0 where the
implementation returns -inf, and ±inf / NaN propagation.

Sign-of-zero is enforced strictly in the comparator so a regression
that flips entr(1.0) from -0.0 to +0.0 would fail loud — that would
indicate the neg/where composition has lost track of the IEEE sign
convention torch.special.entr / scipy.special.entr both follow.

ULP-tolerant comparison (4 ULP relative or 1e-15 absolute floor)
since tensor_entr is essentially one libm log + one mul. Sister
harness to torch_xlog1py_scipy_subprocess_conformance — same scipy
oracle, same fail-loud structure. Files closure for the entr slice
of frankentorch-b5of.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
